meta.title: Unsolicited Response: Selena Larson on Bringing New & Diverse People into the ICS Security Community
meta.description:
Selena Larson got up at S4x20's open mic / Unsolicited Response and discussed the need for the community to be more open, welcoming and diverse.

Note: S4 does not release Unsolicited Response videos unless the speaker requests or approves release.
